channel.title: friendly.atheist TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from friendly.atheist

item.title: Christian Nationalist Jason Rapert thanked me for giving him “free” publicity after I criticized a giant Ten Commandments monument outside a Texas courthouse. But while bragging that his monuments are “absolutely legal,” he conveniently ignored one huge
item.description: Christian Nationalist Jason Rapert thanked me for giving him “free” publicity after I criticized a giant Ten Commandments monument outside a Texas courthouse. But while bragging that his monuments are “absolutely legal,” he conveniently ignored one huge

item.title: A political consulting firm admitted how easy and cheap it is to target religious voters - and why that spells disaster for the future. Their candidates tend to rely on church networks and vague “God and country” messaging. But younger, non-religious vot

item.title: A Louisiana attorney named Richard Trahant warned a Catholic school that its chaplain had previously been accused of misconduct involving a teenager. The priest quickly retired. But instead of rewarding the whistleblower, the courts fined him $400,000 for
item.description: A Louisiana attorney named Richard Trahant warned a Catholic school that its chaplain had previously been accused of misconduct involving a teenager. The priest quickly retired. But instead of rewarding the whistleblower, the courts fined him $400,000 for

item.title: For those of you who enjoy solving crosswords, Friday’s New York Times puzzle is one I wrote! It includes 11 entries that have never appeared in the paper before. Good luck! Tell me what you think! #NYTCrossword #Crossword #NYTGames
item.description: For those of you who enjoy solving crosswords, Friday’s New York Times puzzle is one I wrote! It includes 11 entries that have never appeared in the paper before. Good luck! Tell me what you think! #NYTCrossword #Crossword #NYTGames

item.title: A self-described prophet at a West Virginia megachurch told a teenager to eat a page from the Book of Proverbs while the congregation cheered him on. It's a powerful example of how religious leaders can use pressure, authority, and public spectacle to te

item.title: Ken Ham's Ark Encounter is about to celebrate its 10th anniversary, but the massive Noah's Ark "replica" hasn't lived up to the promises used to justify it. From inflated economic projections to taxpayer-backed incentives, the Creationist theme park is a

item.title: Connecticut just passed a modest law designed to protect homeschooled children in homes where adults are already under investigation for abuse or neglect. Naturally, conservatives are treating it as an attack on parental rights. #Homeschooling #Education
item.description: Connecticut just passed a modest law designed to protect homeschooled children in homes where adults are already under investigation for abuse or neglect. Naturally, conservatives are treating it as an attack on parental rights. #Homeschooling #Education

item.title: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has dramatically reduced the number of religious and non-religious identities recognized by the U.S. military, eliminating categories like Humanist, atheist, Pagan, and others. This accomplishes nothing. #PeteHegseth #Milit
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has dramatically reduced the number of religious and non-religious identities recognized by the U.S. military, eliminating categories like Humanist, atheist, Pagan, and others. This accomplishes nothing. #PeteHegseth #Milit

item.title: A famous bus route in Poland once let tourists take Bus 666 to the town of Hel. After complaints from conservative Christians, the route number was changed in 2023. But now FlixBus has revived Route 666 to Hel—and somehow made it even funnier. The total

item.title: Did FBI Director Kash Patel just fire five analysts for doing their jobs? The agents were investigating a self-described "radical traditional Catholic clerical fascist" who made violent threats and was later arrested before he could allegedly carry out an

item.title: After pressure from Utah's Mormon senators, the Pentagon once again updated its list of recognized religious affiliations in the military. But the new version still creates bizarre categories. Instead of reflecting America's religious diversity, the list

item.title: I just delivered a secular invocation at the DuPage County (IL) board meeting. Here's what I said and why I feel it's important to participate in this sort of ritual. #SecularInvocations #ChurchStateSeparation #Atheism #PrideMonth #BoardMeeting
item.description: I just delivered a secular invocation at the DuPage County (IL) board meeting. Here's what I said and why I feel it's important to participate in this sort of ritual. #SecularInvocations #ChurchStateSeparation #Atheism #PrideMonth #BoardMeeting

item.title: Alliance Defending Freedom says a transgender wrestler did something inappropriate during a high school girls' wrestling match in Washington state. There's just one problem: the video they offer as evidence appears to show a completely ordinary wrestling

item.title: Harmonie Perrone, an Illinois resident, says a Catholic hospital refused to provide timely treatment for her ectopic pregnancy, forcing her to seek help elsewhere as her condition worsened. After losing her ability to become pregnant naturally, Perrone s

item.title: One of the nation's largest Christian adoption and foster care agencies, Bethany Christian Services, is once again refusing to work with same-sex couples after briefly opening its doors to LGBTQ parents in 2021. The organization says it's reinforcing its

item.title: Several San Francisco Giants pitchers used Bible verses to push back against the team's recent "Pride Night" celebration. When MLB warned them for violating league rules on uniform modifications, conservative commentators immediately cried religious disc
item.description: Several San Francisco Giants pitchers used Bible verses to push back against the team's recent "Pride Night" celebration. When MLB warned them for violating league rules on uniform modifications, conservative commentators immediately cried religious disc

item.title: Jackson Lahmeyer—the Oklahoma pastor and founder of “Pastors for Trump”—finally admitted all the allegations about his affair are true. He did it after dropping out of his congressional race and deleting all his social media profiles. After initially dow

item.title: Florida lawmakers approved $15 million in taxpayer-funded security grants for Catholic schools in the Archdiocese of Miami. Supporters say it’s about school safety, but critics argue it effectively subsidizes religious education while public schools conti

item.title: Christian Nationalist activist Tim Barton claimed an early American preacher inspired the Declaration of Independence by using language about "inalienable rights." Just one problem: The quote Barton cited doesn't appear in the book he was holding. This i
item.description: Christian Nationalist activist Tim Barton claimed an early American preacher inspired the Declaration of Independence by using language about "inalienable rights." Just one problem: The quote Barton cited doesn't appear in the book he was holding. This i

item.title: John Dehlin, creator of the Mormon Stories podcast, has officially responded to the LDS Church's lawsuit against him. The case is shaping up as a major fight over criticism, free speech, and who gets to control the conversation about Mormonism. #Mormon #
item.description: John Dehlin, creator of the Mormon Stories podcast, has officially responded to the LDS Church's lawsuit against him. The case is shaping up as a major fight over criticism, free speech, and who gets to control the conversation about Mormonism. #Mormon #

item.title: The Supreme Court just ruled against Damon Landor, a Rastafarian inmate whose religious beliefs were violated when Louisiana prison officers forcibly shaved off his hair. In a 6-3 decision, the Court's conservative majority said Landor cannot sue the ind
item.description: The Supreme Court just ruled against Damon Landor, a Rastafarian inmate whose religious beliefs were violated when Louisiana prison officers forcibly shaved off his hair. In a 6-3 decision, the Court's conservative majority said Landor cannot sue the ind

item.title: Last year, a Tennessee Christian school punished senior Morgan Armstrong after she came out as a lesbian, banning her from graduation and threatening her future. But after Morgan fought back in court, the school has now erased her suspension, promised no
item.description: Last year, a Tennessee Christian school punished senior Morgan Armstrong after she came out as a lesbian, banning her from graduation and threatening her future. But after Morgan fought back in court, the school has now erased her suspension, promised no

item.title: Texas Justice of the Peace Dianne Hensley refused to perform same-sex weddings because of her Christian beliefs, even though she was acting as a government official. A court has now awarded her $10,000 in damages and $630,000 in legal fees. The case raise
item.description: Texas Justice of the Peace Dianne Hensley refused to perform same-sex weddings because of her Christian beliefs, even though she was acting as a government official. A court has now awarded her $10,000 in damages and $630,000 in legal fees. The case raise

item.title: The Texas State Board of Education just voted to require Bible stories as part of its public school reading curriculum. It's a blatant attempt to promote Christianity through government-run education. While supporters claim it's about literacy, the state
